title: Eating Animations x Twilight Forest
description: Add compatibility between Eating Animations and the food of the mod Twilight Forest and variants of some other Twilight Forest theme mod
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility (NEO/FORGE/FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-more-mod-compatibility) ### Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility **Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(NEO/FORGE)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animations) & [(FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Twilight Forest**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) & [**Fork**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-twilight-forest-unofficial) - [**Twilight Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilightdelight) - [**Twilight's Flavor & Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight) - [**Twilight Forest Artifacts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-forest-artifacts) ![j](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a05114b1f96aaff741a988532e09769852299e.png)
